title: centaurea scopulorum
intro: Centaurea scopulorum, also known as Scorpion's Tail, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family that is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Centaurea scopulorum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Centaurea scopulorum is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues.
